title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Wyndham India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Wyndham India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Wyndham India! We are hiring a Hotel Manager for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Wyndham India:
Wyndham India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wyndham India!
